evidence: line 126 is a single inline-code span 'bash mkdir -p .agents/skills/<skill_name> curl -sSL <URL>SKILL.md -o .agents/skills/<skill_name>/SKILL.md' with no fencing/newlines, unlike the correctly fenced ```bash block for the identical instruction at conductor-setup/SKILL.md:182-187
description: The 'exact curl command sequence' the agent is told to run verbatim is collapsed into an unusable, syntactically broken one-liner
suggested_fix: Reformat into a fenced bash code block with mkdir and curl on separate lines, matching conductor-setup/SKILL.md:182-187

evidence: assets/catalog.md URLs all end in '.../main/skills/<name>/' (mutable branch ref, no commit SHA); no step in the SKILL.md resolves or embeds a SHA before the curl -o call, despite the same section's text promising installation 'as a frozen version (commit <sha>)' at line 174/180
description: Skill installation curls a mutable main-branch URL and writes it into .agents/skills/ while claiming commit-SHA pinning that is never actually implemented
suggested_fix: Resolve the latest commit SHA for the skill's source repo before building the download URL, embed it in the raw.githubusercontent.com path, and record it alongside the installed skill

evidence: Same assets/catalog.md URLs ('.../main/skills/<name>/', no commit SHA) and same unfulfilled 'frozen version (commit <sha>)' promise at line 124, with no SHA-resolution step anywhere in the file
